summary: Verified mobile search page filter consolidation on VenuLoQ (viewport 390x844). All requested features are working correctly: Sort/Type/Filters buttons and guest count chips are consolidated in a single compact row inside the sticky header bar. FilterBottomSheet includes the new Vibe/Style section with 7 options (Royal, Modern, Garden, Poolside, Heritage, Intimate, Grand Ballroom). Active filter chips display below the title with Clear all option. Sticky header stays visible when scrolling.

sort_dropdown_in_header.detail: Sort button (data-testid='mobile-sort-btn') found in header filter bar. Opens popover with 'Sort By' title and options like Popular, Price: Low to High

type_dropdown_in_header.detail: Type button (data-testid='mobile-venue-type-filter') found in header. Opens popover with 'Select Venue Types' title showing Banquet Hall, Hotel, etc. with checkboxes

filters_button_opens_bottomsheet.detail: Filters button (data-testid='mobile-more-filters') opens FilterBottomSheet (data-testid='filter-bottom-sheet') with all sections: City, Event Type, Venue Type, Setting, Vibe/Style, Guest Count, Price per Plate, Amenities

vibe_style_section_in_bottomsheet.detail: Vibe / Style section found in FilterBottomSheet with 8 options: Any, Royal, Modern, Garden, Poolside, Heritage, Intimate, Grand Ballroom

guest_count_chips_in_header.detail: All 4 guest count chips found in header row: 0-100 (data-testid='guest-chip-0-100'), 101-250, 251-1K, 1K+. Clicking activates chip with dark background styling

active_filter_chips_display.detail: Active filter chips container (data-testid='mobile-filter-chips') displays below title with 'Active:' label and 'Clear all' button. Shows chips like 'DELHI', '101-250 GUESTS'

search_input_in_header.detail: Search input (data-testid='mobile-search-input') found in sticky header. Typing shows clear button (data-testid='mobile-search-clear')

sticky_header_on_scroll.detail: Sticky header stays visible when scrolling. Filter bar position y=52 after 600px scroll. Sort button remains visible and accessible

venue_cards_after_filter.detail: Venue cards render correctly after filter changes. 328 venue cards found after applying 251-1K guest filter

critical_code_review_comments: VenueSearchPage.js lines 841-1004: Header filter bar correctly implements compact row with Sort, Type, Filters buttons and guest count chips
FilterBottomSheet.jsx lines 46-54: VIBE_OPTIONS array correctly defined with 7 vibe options
FilterBottomSheet.jsx lines 244-254: Vibe / Style section correctly renders with pill buttons for each vibe option
Guest count chips use data-testid pattern 'guest-chip-{min}-{max}' for easy testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile search page filter consolidation verified. Sort/Type/Filters buttons and guest count chips are in a single compact row inside the sticky header (data-testid='header-filter-bar'). FilterBottomSheet includes Vibe/Style section. Old separate rows for guest count and vibe chips were successfully removed from body area.
